description: Universal-core registry. Priorities (P0/P1/P2) and portability levels (U0..U4) follow the AccelFury manifesto. Entries without reference_path are tracked targets; entries with reference_path point to an in-tree manifest at that path.

cores.summary: Single-cycle skid buffer for valid/ready stream backpressure isolation.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: Parameterized N-stage valid/ready pipeline register chain.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: Single-clock synchronous FIFO with first-word-fall-through option.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: Dual-clock asynchronous FIFO with Gray-coded pointers and CDC handshake.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: Simple dual-port RAM inferred to vendor block RAM.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: N-stage reset synchronizer with configurable polarity, async assertion and synchronous deassertion.
Single-bit pulse-toggle synchronizer across two clock domains.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: Four-phase request/ack handshake for slow data crossings between clock domains.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: Memory-mapped GPIO bank with input synchronization and per-pin direction control.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: Programmable timer/counter with one-shot and periodic modes.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: Watchdog timer with reset assertion on kick timeout.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: 8-N-1 UART transmitter and receiver with configurable baud divider.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: SPI master with configurable CPOL/CPHA and per-transfer chip-select control.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: Raw PDM bit-group framing receiver. Not a PDM-to-PCM decimator.
Modular addition z = (a + b) mod p with one conditional subtraction. First in the field-arithmetic lineage (af_mod_sub, af_mod_mul, af_mod_reduce, af_ntt, af_msm, af_poseidon).
Modular subtraction z = (a - b) mod p with one conditional addition. Sibling of af_mod_add in the field-arithmetic lineage.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: Modular multiplication z = (a * b) mod p (Montgomery-friendly default). Random-stress required for wrap/reduction correctness.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: Barrett/Montgomery modular reduction primitive used by af_mod_mul and downstream NTT/MSM cores.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: Number-theoretic transform pipeline over prime fields (radix-2/4 schedule TBD). Vendor DSP backend likely required at U3.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: Multi-scalar multiplication scaffold for elliptic-curve / zk pipelines. Educational scope; production MSM needs vendor backends.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet

cores.summary: Poseidon hash core (zk-friendly arithmetic hash). Formal equivalence against reference implementation required before promoting maturity.
cores.tracking_issue: manifesto-roadmap: tracked-only, no in-tree RTL yet
